data.body: Anti-pattern scan complete: 2 confirmed candidates in other skill files (same root cause: Multi-File State De-sync from epic 28cb-a23a). Bug tickets created: 27de-979d (ui-discover/SKILL.md line 581), 811d-09f5 (end-session/SKILL.md Step 3.5). Not fixed inline — require separate task-level authorization for those safeguard files.
